'''Banvhar Station''' was the [[Asteroid base|asteroid headquarters]] of the [[Banvhar Combine]] asteroid miners. Due to the fact that they were located near [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] spaceways, their minerals were stolen by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and even some of the residents were used as target practice for [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous's]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] army. Because of this, the remaining miners bore a great hatred against the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] general. They even assisted a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] deserters to locate Grievous and sneak into enemy territory and assassinate the General.

{{Planet-stub}}
